snippet.title: BardiyaKo Bagh [Child Version]- Kamal BC Maldai & Aakriti Rai - Mariya Gurung - New Nepali Song 2026
snippet.description:
Kamal BC Maldai Presents:-
BardiyaKo Bagh

--------------------------------------
#BardiyaKoBagh #kamalbcmaldai #KataKata #KamalBC #NepaliSong #NepaliMusic #LokDohori #TrendingNepaliSong #chldversion #aakritirai #bhojpurenani #bhojpureraini

🎶 Audio Credits:- 

♬ Song:- 
Bardiya Ko Bagh

♬ Vocal:-
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai

♬ Lyrics/ Music :- 
Kamal BC Maldai

♬ Music Arranger :- 
Bishwas Nepal

♬ Mix/Mastering :- 
Shyam Swet Rasaili

♬ Studio :- 
Prisma Recording Studio KTM

♬ Audio | Video:- 
Kamal BC Maldai
+977-9851240302
----------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:- 

🎬 Cast :- 
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai
Mariya Gurung

🎬 Director | Cinematographer:- 
Prakash Khadka & Team

🎬 Editor | Colorist:- 
Manoj Karki

🎬 MUA:- 
Sangita Chand Thakuri

BLESSED
MAN BAHADUR BUDHA (FATHER) 
TOPKALA BUDHA  (MOTHER)

SPECIAL THANKS :-
Bijay Rai
Chitra Bahadur Gurung
Manju Gurung
Anjana Gurung
Suk Bahadur Gurung
Amita Gurung
Sanju Gurung
Anju Gurung


--------------------------------------------

Lyrics :-

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma


© Kamal BC Maldai, 2026
All Rights Reserved

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! 💃

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‘Bandhu 2.0’ from ‘Cocktail 2’! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna

Directed by : Amar Kaushik

Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

Sakha tumhi

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | Paid Previews Begin In Cinemas-25th June, 7:30 PM onwards
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

Advance booking open now: https://linktr.ee/WelcomeToTheJungleTickets 

Watch the #WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer now and get ready for the wildest adventure of the year!

#WelcomeToTheJungle, paid previews begin 25th June, 7:30 PM onwards 🍿

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

snippet.title: 9th Anniversary Animation Trailer এসে গেছে! 🎉
snippet.description:
9th Anniversary Animation Trailer এসে গেছে! 🎉

Free Fire-এর ৯ম জন্মদিন একদম কাছেই, আর এবার জেগে উঠতে যাচ্ছে নতুন এক শক্তি... 👀

প্রস্তুত হোন নতুন স্কিল, নতুন কমব্যাট সম্ভাবনা আর আরও শক্তিশালী ব্যাটেলের জন্য। 🔥

আপনি কোন ধরনের স্কিল আপগ্রেড দেখতে চান?

সাথেই থাকুন Full Animation এবং 9th Anniversary-এর আরও চমকের জন্য।

#FreeFire9 #FreeFire9thAnniversary #Booyah

snippet.title: Qaafirana | Kedarnath | Sushant Rajput | Sara Ali Khan | Arijit Singh & Nikhita | Amit Trived
snippet.description:
RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present Kedarnath Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya
Directed by Abhishek Kapoor
Produced by Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor 
Co-Produced by Abhishek Kapoor & Abhishek Nayyar 
Story: Abhishek Kapoor & Kanika Dhillon 
Screenplay & Dialogue: Kanika Dhillon 
Music: Amit Trivedi 
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya 
DOP: Tushar Kanti Ray 
Production Design: Mayur Sharma
Action Director: Dave Judge & Sunil Rodrigues 
Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya
Singers: Arijit Singh & Nikhita Gandhi

snippet.title: MAA KA SAYA I माँ का साया I OFFICIAL TRAILER I ANJANA SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #bhojpurimovie #rakeshbabu  #maakasaya #bhojpurimovie #trailer #trending 

 IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH RAAKI FILMS LLP

फ़िल्म - माँ का साया

कलाकार - अंजना  सिंह  , राकेश  बाबू  , भूपेंद्र  सिंह  , कंचन  मिश्रा  , अयाज़  खान  की  सी .पी भट्ट , निशा  सिंह  , श्वेता  यादव, रिंकू  आयुषी  , सुरेंद्र  कुमार  त्रिपाठी  , स्वेता  यादव  
बाल कलाकार  – ढोलू  , पल्लवी

कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह

निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुडूरी

लेखक - सत्येंद्र सिंह

संगीतकार- ओम झा

संकलन - प्रीतम नायक

छायांकन- महेंद्र मंगती (माही )

ट्रेलर - धरम सोनी  
मारधार    – दिनेश  यादव   
कोरियोग्राफर - प्रवीण सालार
एसोसिएट डायरेक्टर  – रवि  तिवारी  , सुवेश , मेज़र , अमन  सिंह  
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन -बॉलीवुड उमंग

आर्ट डायरेक्टर – शिवा जयसवाल
पब्लिसिटी डिज़ाइनर : देवा आर्ट ( सूरज गिरी )
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, अथर्व सिंह

 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
,सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी


B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 

मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  

प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , , हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , 

FILM- MAA KA SAYA 

STARCAST- ANJANA SINGH , RAKESH BABU , BHUPENDRA SINGH , KANCHAN MISHRA , AYAZ KHAN C.P BHATT, NISHA SINGH , SHWETA YADAV ,RINKU AYUSHI , SURENDRA KUMAR TRIPATHI , SWETA YADAV 
CHILD ARTIST – DHOLU , PALLAVI
DIRECTOR- PRAVEEN KUMAR GUDURI  
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER – SATYENDRA SINGH
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA  
LYRICS – PYARE LAL YADAV
EDITOR- PREETAM NAYAK
CINEMATOGRAPHER- MAHENDRA MANGTI (MAHI )
ASSOCIATE DIRECTOR – RAVI TIWARI , SUVESH, MAZER, AMAN SINGH 
CHOREOGRAPHER- PRAVEEN SAILAR
ART DIRECTOR- SHIVA JAISWAL
POST PRODUCTION – BOLLYWOOD UMANG 
PROMO EDITOR – DHARAM SONI 
ACTION – DINESH YADAV  
Publicity Designer : Dewa Art ( Suraj Giri )

PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, ATHARVA SINGH 

Music – IVY Music 
 satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI



B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE MORE

OFFICE BOY – KANHAIYA JHA 

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY 

B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, SHAILESH TRIVEDI

snippet.description:

by Prashant Poudel only on Prashant Poudel's official YouTube channel.

narendra biyogi


LYRICS
kati ramro sanbabu mohani layauni fida vaya ekainajarma
yati ramro sanbabu janmiyau kasari timi yautai lakhau hajar ma 

kati ramri sannani mohani layauni fida vaya ekainajarma
yati ramri sannani janmiyau kasari timi yautai lakhau hajar ma

Pokharako fewatala ghumaidiula dungama
Dila basyo timle sirma lako ful ko thumgama
man bho chanchala 
mayalulai ghumaula chauda anchala

Vet huna ho ma besi jhareko
Nachinejhai kina ho gareko

Man nadulau sanbabu k ma rupko ramro chhainara
Rup k herchhau sanbabu maya garne man le hainara

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | GRAND FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

This is it! The final day of the BMPS 2026 Grand Finals.

After an incredible journey through every stage of the tournament, it all comes down to one last day. Every elimination, every placement point, and every Chicken Dinner could decide who will be crowned the BMPS 2026 Champions.

Sixteen teams entered the Grand Finals, but only one will lift the trophy and etch their name into BMPS history.

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹4Cr

Map Rotation
Match ⚔️1 : Rondo
Match ⚔️2 : Erangel

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab’e Ghum guzaar ke
Weera’an hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect: 
Asim Azhar ( https://www.instagram.com/asimazhar/?hl=en)
Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

#AsimAzhar #Aarzu #PakistaniPop #DesiMusic #NewMusic #IPop 

(C) 2026 Asim Azhar

snippet.title: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka | Superhit Romantic Rain Song | Andaaz
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of Bollywood romance with "Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka", a timeless melody from the blockbuster movie . Sung by the legendary voices of Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this evergreen rain song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and monsoon romance.

Featuring Akshay Kumar, Priyanka Chopra, and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most cherished romantic tracks of the 2000s.

Movie: Andaaz (2003)
Song: Aayega Maza Ab Barsaat Ka 
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Lara Dutta, and Priyanka Chopra
Singer: Alka Yagnik, Babul Supriyo
Music: Nadeem Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Directed by: Raj Kanwar 


#AayegaMazaAbBarsaatKa #Andaaz #KumarSanu #AlkaYagnik #AkshayKumar #PriyankaChopra #LaraDutta #RomanticSong #RainSong #BollywoodSongs #HindiSongs #EvergreenHits #NadeemShravan #Sameer #ShreeKrishnaInternational

bn.title: স্পাইডার-ম্যান ব্র্যান্ড নিউ ডে ট্রেলার • রিঅ্যাকশন
bn.description:
#স্পাইডারম্যান #দ্যপিজে #পিজেএক্সপ্লেইনড

আমার সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া হ্যান্ডেলগুলো: 
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
টুইটার: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
স্ন্যাপচ্যাট: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

থ্রেডস: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
ফেসবুক: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

thePJ হলো একটি ওয়েব চ্যানেল, যার উদ্দেশ্য হলো চলচ্চিত্র পর্যালোচনা, সাক্ষাৎকার, আলোচনা, ভিডিও প্রবন্ধ এবং বিশ্লেষণধর্মী সংকলনের মাধ্যমে সিনেমার প্রচার করা। এর প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো সিনেমার বিষয়ে তথ্যসমৃদ্ধ আলোচনা, সমালোচনা এবং পর্যালোচনাকে উৎসাহিত করা এবং এই উদ্দেশ্যে অনুষ্ঠানগুলোতে চলচ্চিত্র, শব্দ রেকর্ডিং এবং আলোকচিত্রের সংক্ষিপ্ত অংশ ব্যবহার করা হয়। এই ক্লিপ এবং অংশবিশেষগুলো খুবই সামান্য এবং এর ব্যবহার কপিরাইটের মালিকদের দ্বারা সম্পূর্ণ কাজটির বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহারে কোনোভাবেই হস্তক্ষেপ করার উদ্দেশ্যে নয়। কাজগুলোর ব্যবহার কপিরাইট আইনের ৫২ ধারার অধীনে প্রদত্ত ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের ব্যতিক্রমের সাথে সঙ্গতিপূর্ণ, এবং আমরা সমালোচনা ও পর্যালোচনার জন্য প্রদত্ত ব্যতিক্রমের অধীনে কাজগুলো ব্যবহারের দাবি করি।

snippet.title: Mohammad Faiz – Eyes (Official Video) | Starring Akanksha Choudhary
snippet.description:
Eyes is an R&B Trap and Rajasthani Pop song that fuses modern sounds with Rajasthani roots. A story of love, attraction, and the emotions hidden behind a glance, the song captures what words often cannot express. 


Audio Credits :

Singing, composition and Lyrics - Mohammad Faiz 
Music - Hiten
Mix and Master - Hiten
Guitars - Saby
Recording engineer - Mrigank

Starring - Akanksha Choudhary 

Video Credits :

Director - Mohammad Faiz 
DOP, Creative Director - Arshad Khan
First AD - Sahiba Khan
Ad - Shahrukh khan
Editor, DI - Inkblaze Studios
VFX - Harshit 
Producer - Mohammad Faiz 
Project Manager - Prateek Ramawat 
Costume designers - Faiz, Sahiba Khan and FilAishé 
Rajasthani fabrics - Abdulla Fabrics 
LP - Shahrukh khan
Production - Everest Studios
Production manager - Ankur Tanwar
Asst. Production manager - Jatin Aman
Gaffer - Subhash Kumar
Hair - Azrudin 
Make up - Dhanwantari Swami 
BTS - Manoj Ramawat and Kamal khaj
Security - Murli Manohar
Dressman - Jitesh Kumar
Tailor - Udaykant mandal
Spot - Team Kamal
Lights - Light camera aktion and Shreeji lights
Lighting team - Sushil Sahu, Nitish, Raj, Virendar, Hemanth, Ravi and Rahul
Artwork - The Visuals Vague





Lyrics : 

Kai Raatan di tu jagaa
Heartbeat bhi di tu bhaga
Meri zindagi ma ab to
Maalum ha mhane ke laga 
chaand chaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi…
Atto pyaar devagi…
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do 
Atto pyaar devagi…

Tane soch, tere liye saaro gaaya jaave shehar
Teri sunke awaaz hi surilo pad gyo
Jaipur na bhi kargi gulabi chhori
Tane dekh saaro jodhpur neelo pad gyo

Koi sachoge bhi koni aiso kaam krdyuń
Tera qadma ka nicha saaro gaam krdyuń
Bol aaj hi miladyuń tana maa sa meri
Mera ghar haali chaabya tera naam krdyuń

Ab koni hova ha sabar
Aake puch la meri khabar
Dil sach mero keva ha agar
Mera har ek birthday par
Uphaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto pyaar devagi
Teri ankhya do
Mhane maar devagi…

Mhane maar devagi…
Atto pyaar devagi…
Mhane maar devagi
Teri aankhya do
Atto Pyaar devagi…

Translation :

You've kept me awake through countless nights,And set my heartbeat racing wild.
Now in my life, I've finally realized,What true love feels like.
Your two eyes will light up my world,Like moonlight blessing every corner.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Thinking of you set the whole city singing,Your voice made every melody sweeter.
You made even Jaipur blush a deeper pink, girl,And one look at you turned all of Jodhpur blue.
No one would believe I'd go this far,I'd lay the whole city at your feet.
Say the word, I'll introduce you to my mother today,I'll hand you my home's keys in your hand.
I can no longer be patient,Come and ask how I've been.
If my heart truly speaks the truth,Then on every birthday of mine,
Your two eyes will be the gift,I wait to receive each year.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.
Your two eyes will slay me.
Your two eyes will shower me with love.

snippet.title: Alpha Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Alpha Trailer Review by Deeksha Sharma. Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol Directed by Shiv Rawail Alpha from YRF Spy Universe will follow War 2 Pathaan & Tiger with Action, Romance, Revenge & Lot of Action with Social Media Attention. Alpha Alia Bhatt Movie Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectations would be shared in this Video. Can YRF take on Dhurandhar Aditya Dhar Cinema with Hrithik Roshan Cameo in Alpha Universe- Do leave Comments below.

snippet.title: #Video - #Shilpi Raj | तू कृष्ण हम राधा | #Niva Yadav - Tu Krishna Ham Radha | Fashion Firoj Imran
snippet.description:
#Video - #Shilpi Raj | तू कृष्ण हम राधा | #Niva Yadav - Tu Krishna Ham Radha | Fashion Firoj Imran

Song :- Tu Krishan Ham Radha
Singer :- Shilpi Raj | Fashion Firoj Imran
Lyrics :- Rahul Rashik & Rajan Raj
Music :- Mantu Manish
Mix & Master :- Lucky Recording Studio
Feat : Niva Yadav & Irshad Ansari
Director : Nabin Patel (Nepali)
Choreographer : D+ Dance Academy
Dop : Anish Video Production (Anish Chaurasiya)
Edit : Manish Ji (Av Production)
Makeup : Madhu Chaudhary & Priyaka 
Special Thanks : Prithvi Jaiswal & Arbaz Banu & All Ego Records Team
Producer : Binita Patel & Arun Yadav
Owner :- Ajay Patel 
Manager :- Full Kumar
Label :-  Ego Records Bhojpuri Presents
Trade Enquiry :- 9102002190

Digital Management :- Suraj Snehi
CMS Partner : AVIDZ

SOCIAL MEDIA LINK :-
Facbook Page :- https://www.facebook.com/61551103903140

Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/egorecordsbhojpuri/

Please Subscribe My Channel :- https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8INtlZJuT4Ds_Ye5PToOug

Lyrics :-
Prem Geet Man Meet Ke Sanghe Gawa Rani
Chehra Se Laj Ke Parda Hatawa Rani - 2
Ham Pyar Karile Tohra Se Jaan
Janwo Se Jyada
Sath Na Sat Janm Chhodab Ham Karatani Tohse Wada - 2
Tu Bansi Bajawa Krishna Jas Ham Banke Nachab Radha  - 2

Hir Ke Moraniya Van Me 
Badra Ke Dekhi Sudh Budh Dela Gawai
Tashvir Tohar Bani Dil Me Basawle
Chir Ke Kaha Ta Ka Kareja Dekhai
Tohase Juda Na Hokhab Kabahu Bate Irada
Sath Na Sat Janm Tak Chhodab Karatani Wada
Tu Bansi Bajawa Krishna Jas Hum Banke Nachab Radha

Neh Ke Gagariya Chhalke Naina So Tohar
Ehe Ada Man Mohe
Yeho Sawariya Dil Ke Bhitariya
Badhe Bechaini Mohe Kuchh Kuchh Howe
Imran Na Tohar Sath Chhodab Ham Aai Kawno Badha
Sath na Sat Janm Chhodab Ham Kartani Tohase Wada
Tu Bansi Bajawa Karishna Jas Ham Banke Nachab Radha
***********************************

snippet.description:
🎵 "Nachau Jhumera" is an energetic dance song performed by Yogesh Lama and Lamu Sherpa. Written, composed, and arranged by Yogesh Lama, the song features catchy melodies and an engaging musical arrangement. Directed by Nirmal Kumar Lama, with choreography by Bhimphedi Guys and Sagar Lopchan, the video brings together the performances of Sanjana Gurung, Bhimphedi Guys, Sagar Lopchan, Rushal Syangbo and Rupchen Tamang, creating an entertaining visual and musical experience.

snippet.title: Mashooqa (Full HD Video) Kriti Sanon, Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna | Cocktail 2 Songs | Pritam
snippet.description:
Presenting the sizzling track "Mashooqa" from the highly anticipated romantic drama 'Cocktail 2'! Get ready to groove to this ultimate modern vibe composed by the hit machine Pritam and Mahmood, bringing a fresh wave of energy to your playlist. 

Hit 'LIKE' if you are playing this on loop, and don't forget to SUBSCRIBE for more exclusive tracks!


Track Credits:
🎤 Singers: Pritam, Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya, Raghav Chaitanya, Ruaa Kayy
🎵 Music Composer: Mahmood, Pritam
✍️ Lyricist: Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya
🎬 Music Label: Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd. / Maddock Films Pvt. Ltd.

Movie Credits:
🎬 Movie: Cocktail 2
⭐ Starring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna, Dimple Kapadia, Rohit Saraf, Ishita Dutta
🎬 Director: Homi Adajania
💼 Producer: Dinesh Vijan (Maddock Films)
✍️ Writer: Luv Ranjan, Tarun Jain
📅 Theatrical Release Date: June 19, 2026

Lyrics:

Sai mi chiedo perché mi seduci quando ti avvicini 
Parli con la gente non capisco mai
Perché Lo fai 
Sembriamo amici Che finiranno nei guai 

(Come Get Me Now)x4

(Karein toh karein kya dil hai ..
Come get me Now 
Dil hai tabhi mushkil hai
Come get me Now ..) ×2

CROSS
Pade agar tere liye
Mar bhi jaana

Uff nahin kare deewana

Ma Ma Maashooqa
O My Mashooqa

Teer teri nazron ka
Toh kabhi na chooka

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka
Haye haye haye ..

ANTARA

Teer-e-nazar ka banaya tu ne
Jise bhi nishaana
Jaane kyon chaah ke bhi
Chaahe na vo ख़ुद ko bachana

Jise gale se ik PAL ke liye BHI tu laga le
Poori umar uss PAL mein
बिता le vo deewaana

Kaam deevanon ka
Hosh gavana hai
Aur haseenon pe
Dosh lagana hai 

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka

Baby cosa c’è 
Parlami di te 

Resta fuori con me nel week end 

Baby non lo so
Forse partirò 
Dammi un segno 
Perché in fondo 
Tu qua vicino dimmi cosa ci fai 
Mi chiedi baby quanti  posti vedrai 

Andiamo nei 
BRUNEI 
Uk
LA
SE SAI 
DI FAKE 
ti saluterò

Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai

snippet.title: Sannani | Bikash X Beon X Pawan | Dreamstage Production
snippet.description:
SANNANI (Official Music Video Release)  By Dreamstage Productions 
Subscribe to DreamStage Productions to stay updated with our latest music videos, exclusive releases, and exciting upcoming projects. Thank you for your support—more amazing content is on the way!
Stay tuned for future releases and be part of our musical journey.
https://www.youtube.com/@UCknIU_nxhciR_kaB7mONdwQ 

Presenting the official music video of "Sannani," one of the most viral Nepali TikTok songs, reaching over 20 million people across social media platforms. This track combines catchy melodies, energetic beats, and an experimental musical style to create a unique listening experience. Originally released as an audio track on May 20, 2026, "Sannani" quickly became a major TikTok sensation. 

Audio Credits:
Vocals: Bikash Chandra Thapa, Beon Beats, Pawan Chand
Studio : Dreamstage Recording Studios
Producer/mix-master: Beon Beats
Featuring: Bikash, Beon, Pawan 
Genre: Nepali Melodic Hip-Hop, Experimental Song
Music Video Official Release 2026
Ownership Protected by : SwarVision Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.  
If you enjoyed the song, don't forget to:
Like, Comment, Subscribe & Share with your friends. 

VIDEO CREDITS:
Production House: LOCOLIZE CREATIVES PVT. LTD.
Directed By: Bijesh Bajracharya & Aone Magar
Director of Photography (DOP): Sachet Kadel & Bijesh Bajracharya
Assistant Camera (AC): Ishwor Nagarkoti & NyamaSang Tamang
2nd Assistant Camera: Ganesh
Production Manager: Raman Khadgi
Production Assistants: Shristi Shrestha, Nirajan Adhikari & Estella Pujari
Choreographer: Ashmee Bhujel
Stylist: Ninnie
Makeup Artist: Binu Shrestha
Model: RIRI
Featuring: Ashim Ranabhat & Adrina Chitrakar
Stills & Behind-the-Scenes (BTS): Rijan Shrestha
Gaffer: Deependra Thapaliya
Editor: Bijesh Bajracharya
Poster Design: Wximage

snippet.title: Oasis Thapa -  Sakey  |  सके  [ Official Music Video ]
snippet.description:
sakey  |  सके

Hi! bhanna ta dherai kura bhanna man cha tara kaa bata po suru garney... A song written 3 years ago with 3 different version each year. Ek point ma ta laageko thyo hyaa ettikai haaldinchu ma kina etro mehenat gariraachu bhanera tara khai man le namaanney. Ajjai pugena, yo bhayena, tyo bhayena, yo ajjai better garna sakchu, I can polish this a lot more bhanney soch le 3 barsa laagyo yo geet release garna. I guess this urge to serve quality everytime is a gift and a curse but so far I'm super satisfied with the end craft. The whole entire team was teaming. Yesai sndarva ma I hope I get to release my songs more consistently which I've written for over 4 years. Some old and some recent. Life been nerfing me so much I'm just discovering esto ni hudo raicha bhanera. I be like f'k yeah new year new energy and motivation to do more and then every year life be like here hold this new L for now. K sikaauna khojeko ni tha chaina. Just weird. There has been a few blessings I've received which I'm super grateful for though. There's this strong sense to protect that unlike anything. So, yeah a little life update but I really hope I can keep serving for now. See you guys on the next one.

Audio Link:
https://open.spotify.com/track/5P5m2swluasZrMNIsRShw4?si=96POEiDcR6yCDnBkxDz10Q

Lyrics:

Sakey ta ma dine thiye
Bache kuche ka sara
Mero Maya timi lai
Mero Maya timi lai

Sochina kahilei timrai barey
Timrai aakhaa kai pareli le jhukkyaaula
Todera jodidai
Dhadkera rokidai
Tadpera jogidai
Sambhaalula

Jhutho aashaa jhutho sapanaa
lai parkhera
Adhuro chahaanaa apuraa bahaanaa 
lai samjhera

Baaki rahey 
Nisaasiyeko saasai jaleyra 
Bhymari jhai aago salki rahey
Chaati chhiya chhiya kharaani bhaye

Sakey ta ma diney thiye
Bache kuchey ka saaraa
Mero maya timi lai
Mero maya timi lai

Timi lai ma
Timi

Doman bho mutu mero dui bhaagai anidho
Badliyo mausam mero ujeli dhaakiyo
Farkiyo baadal kaalo sang jhari orli
Sakhaapai mero haal chaalai bharam mai
Baache jhai bhaako cha maya
Kun kissa metaaye mandir kun jalaayera
Milcha aanandi yahaa? 

Sakye ta sakey ta
Sake ta ma
Sakeye ta sakey ta
Shakey ta ma

-------------------------------------------------------------

bn.title: ROBLOX-এ পেইন্ট অর সিক!!
bn.description:
রোবলক্সে রঙ করুন বা খুঁজুন!!

ইনস্টাগ্রামে আমাকে এখানে ফলো করুন - https://www.instagram.com/shivang_ranjan41/

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

যেকোনো সমস্যা সম্পর্কে আমাদের এখানে ইমেল করতে পারেন - shivangcare@gmail.com

#gemblox #shivangmini #roblox #robloxenglish

snippet.title: ROCKHEADS | MAYA KO AAGO | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Music | Arrangement | Performed by : Rockheads
Lyrics : Ashtrona.
Composition : Rockheads / Ashtrona
Mixed|Mastered : Saswot shrestha (Omniphonics Studios)
Recorded by : Samyak Lama / Dawa Sherpa.
Recorded at : DrumroombyRockheads/ EOHLabs
Acoustic Guitar | Mandolin       : Saswot Shrestha.
Back vocals | Studio assistant :Pradhumna Shrestha 

Music video by Chinoetales Production.
..........................................................................
OUR PARTNERS:

Visual Partner       : Triumph Events.
Venue partner      : Sasa Twa.
Decor Partner      : Garima Florist.
Musical Partner   : Harmonium Musicals.
Touring Partner   : Khadka groups (USA)
(2026)                  : Hamro Events (Canada)


Cast : 
Abhishek Khadka , Parika Bhandari

Supporting act : 
Amar Babu (Brother), Badri Pudasaini (Father), Ganu Koirala (Mother)

Director : Abhi Sampang Rai
D.O.P : Bikesh Magar
Creative Director: Devarshi.S
Asst. Director : Aakash Poudel
Art Direction: Shristi Rai, Ongdi Moktan
Project Manager: Aadi Pahari
Cinematographer: Prabin Gurung, Durga Singh Thakuri
MUA/Hair : Samasti Rai, Reenu Yakha Limbu
Stylist: Bomi Rai
Assist Stylist: Nurja Rai
Content Manager: Santosh Shah Thakuri & Dipika Rai
Gaffer: Himal Sharma
Production Manager: Shyam Khadka
Assist prod: Arbin Uranw, Shankar Parajuli, Dhiraj Thapa Magar, Ashish Shrestha 
Kitchen : Sabin Shrestha and Team

Extras :
Puju Shrestha, Ranju Nepal, Sundar Pariyar, Dipak Gajamer, Sagar Panta, Jaya Ram Bhatta, DP Bhattarai, Sailendra Raj Bhattarai, Radha Krishna Bhatta, Mana Maya Magar, Prem Nath Pathak, Anita Giri, Suprina Nepal, Abshiek Rai, Radhika Thapa, Laxmi Budha, Anshika Gurung, Sandesh Tamang, Samir Diyali, Sujata Magar, ⁠Samita Tamang, Namaraj Pokhral


Special Thanks : 
 
Parbat Bhandari dai for having such blind faith on us. Kiran Pratap Singh bhai for guiding us through this beautiful journey. Ashtrona - you are a true Artist and beautiful inspiring soul we have come across. Prajesh (Harmonium musicals) dai for constantly supporting us from day 1. 
Snehi Karmacharya, Arshia Shrestha, Dolmu Sherpa, Crishtina Tamang for supporting constantly and holding hands on this journey to follow this dream. Saswot shrestha bhai for handling the craziness we bring to your studio.
Our touring Crew - Sabin Shakya / Rupesh Gurung for all the hard work and tolerance.

Slick pick for producing such great Merch for us.
...........................................................................
  -----   Rockheads lineup  -----
Vocal /Bass  :  Sanjay Aryal https://www.instagram.com/sanjay_rockheads

Drums          :  Samyak Lama https://www.instagram.com/samyak_rockheads

Keyboard /Synth :  Dawa Sherpa https://www.instagram.com/d12sherpa

Guitar  :  Ridesh Pakhrin Tamang https://www.instagram.com/rideshonguitar
Live Sound                  :  Sabin Shakya
Live Lighting design  :  Rupesh Gurung
...........................................................................
Official Instagram -   https://www.instagram.com/rockheadsnepal/

Official Website - https://rockheadsofficial.com/

🎤 Lyrics: Dominic Fike - Babydoll
I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighing you down

Find me on Miami concrete
Lookin' for somebody different 'cause my daddy was a pimp
My mama had her issues but I miss her anyway, oh, babydoll

Please don't call me for the wrong reasons
We both know exactly what I'm thinkin'
Weeks pass and I never grow tired
'Cause I never said never, and I barely ever lie

I'm on a road to an original place in outer space
I didn't make it up, but you can't find it on a phone, or a globe
And I can take you with me if you really wanna go, oh, babydoll
I can't move on

And I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighing you down

ভারতে তাদের সেরা পরিষেবাগুলো সহ:
https://gbnodes.host/
▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া :

তাড়াতাড়ি ফলো করে নিন :)
https://www.instagram.com/adispotxd/

ডিসকর্ড
https://discord.gg/adispot

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

snippet.title: Salala Karnali | Pramod Kharel | Pramod & Parampara | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
A soulful tribute to the beauty of Karnali, "Salala Karnali" brings together the timeless voice of Pramod Kharel with the words and music of Suraj Thapa. Shot amid the breathtaking landscapes of Jumla, this song is a heartfelt celebration of love, land, and the spirit of the Karnali region.

🎵 SONG: Salala Karnali

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Lyrics / Music: 
Suraj Thapa

Vocal: 
Pramod Kharel

Supporting Vocal: 
Shristi Budha

Music Arrangement: 
Pramod & Parampara, Suraj Thapa

Additional Music Arrangement: 
Rahul Bhujel

Intro Lyrics: 
Bhim BC

Pramod Kharel

Bikram Karki, Pratik Biswokarma, Suraj Thapa

Recordist:

snippet.title: The Neighbourhood - Sweater Weather (Lyrics + Letra)
snippet.description:
🩸Lyrics →
All I am is a man
I want the world in my hands
I hate the beach, but I stand
In California, with my toes in the sand

Use the sleeves of my sweater
Let's have an adventure
Head in the clouds, but my gravity's centered
Touch my neck and I'll touch yours
You in those little high waisted shorts, oh

She knows what I think about
And what I think about
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that wouldn't wanna tell you about no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

And if I may just take your breath away
I don't mind if there's not much to say
Sometimes the silence guides our minds
To move to a place so far away

The goosebumps start to raise
The minute that my left hand meets your waist
And then I watch your face
Put my finger on your tongue, 'cause you love to taste, yeah

These hearts adore
Everyone the other beats hardest for
Inside, this place is warm
Outside, it starts to pour

Coming down
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that I wouldn't wanna tell you about, no, no, no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater, ooh, ooh

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
Let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

It's too cold
It's too cold
The holes of my sweater

❤️‍🔥Tags →

snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Akshay & IP
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Ucha Lamba Kad Forever | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar | Disha Patani | Vikram M | 26th June

snippet.title: Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Bhul Jana – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Agar mumkin ho…
to hume bhul jana.

Hum tumhari zindagi me
sirf dard bankar aaye the…
aur ab yaadon me bhi
rehna nahi chahte.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri…
par shayad
tumhare liye nahi thi.

“Bhul Jana”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
sirf dusre ki khushi chahta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
judai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

agar sukoon mile…
to hume bhul jana…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir use khud se door karna pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)


---

bn.title: আমি Blox Fruits-এ আমার Ghoul V4 সম্পূর্ণভাবে জাগিয়ে তুলেছি
bn.description:
আমি ব্লক্স ফ্রুটস-এ আমার ঘুল V4 সম্পূর্ণরূপে জাগিয়ে তুলেছি
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
📱 আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন: 
গিভঅ্যাওয়ে এবং সাশ্রয়ী মূল্যের পোশাকের জন্য আমার রোবলক্স কমিউনিটিতে যোগ দিন 
= https://www.roblox.com/communities/415245056/SujalisLive#!/about
২য় চ্যানেল =https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHEYPkg83NwMWahJzyWbWTQ
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/sujal_mundlia/ 
ডিসকর্ড: https://discord.gg/XtavTBQSUk
রোবলক্স প্রোফাইল: https://www.roblox.com/users/5080383735/profile 
কিক-এ আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন = https://kick.com/sujalislive
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 
🎮 চ্যানেল সম্পর্কে: 
সুজালিসলাইভ একটি হিন্দি গেমিং চ্যানেল, যেখানে আমি রোবলক্সের উপর বিনোদনমূলক এবং গল্প-নির্ভর ভিডিও আপলোড করি। এই মুহূর্তে, আমি **রোবলক্স ব্লক্স ফ্রুটস**-এর উপর মনোযোগ দিচ্ছি — এটি রোবলক্সের অন্যতম জনপ্রিয় ওয়ান পিস-অনুপ্রাণিত একটি গেম, যেখানে আপনি বসদের সাথে লড়াই করেন, লেভেল আপ করেন এবং সবচেয়ে শক্তিশালী খেলোয়াড় হয়ে ওঠেন। 

আপনি নতুন বা অভিজ্ঞ, যাই হোন না কেন, এখানে আপনি মজার মুহূর্ত, গ্রাইন্ডিং টিপস এবং দুর্দান্ত সব লড়াই খুঁজে পাবেন — সবই হিংলাশে। জিটিএ ৬ এবং তার পরবর্তী গেমগুলোর জন্য একটি অনুগত গেমিং দর্শক তৈরি করার এই যাত্রায় আমার সাথে যোগ দিন!

🎨 থাম্বনেইল তৈরি করেছেন: 1035452937671024700 atharvartist7 ( ডিসকর্ড )

snippet.title: Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang || Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan || New Selo Song 2026/2082
snippet.description:
🎶 Presenting New Selo Song 2026/2082
"Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang" by Bishwo Dong & Alina Yonjan.
Hope you all enjoy this beautiful selo audio song. 
Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more new Tamang songs. ❤️

🎧 Song : Manjurinama Deuna Maichyang
🎤 Vocal : Bishwo Dong / Alina Yonjan
✍️🎼 Lyrics / Music / Arrange : Bishwo Dong
🎚 Mixing / Mastering : Dipesh Pradhan (Deep Studio)
🎙 Studio : Dong Studio
🤝 Supporter : Lal Dhoj Tamang

© All Rights Reserved

🔔 Subscribe for more new Tamang Selo songs
👍 Like | Comment | Share

#ManjurinamaDeunaMaichyang
#BishwoDong
#AlinaYonjan
#TamangSeloSong
#NewSeloSong2026
#NepaliSong
#TamangSong
#DongStudio
----------------------------------------------------
१.केटा :
मञ्जुरीनामा देउन मैच्याङ , तिम्रै वरिपरि बस्न लाई २
डाहा त गर्ने दुनियाँ सामु , मायाको डोरी कस्न लाई २
दिलै खोली मन साटेर , मलाई छेउ कुना बस्न देउ १
शंकले होईन मायाले , यो च्याङ्बालाई स्विकारि देउ २

१.केटी :
राजिनामा पेश गर्छु म त , च्याङ्बाको यस्तो पारा लाई
सोमात भन्ने केही छैन , तामासा देखाउँछ सारा लाई
किन पो बस्नु मेरो छेउ , यो झ्यान नभै नामसारी 
खुस्केको होकि त्यो दिमाग , शंका नै लाग्छ गरि गरि

२.केटा :
च्याङ्बाको कुरा सुन मैच्याङ , मायामा गरौं गठ्बन्धन २
धर्ती फाट्ला आकाश खस्ला , छुट्दैन मायाको यो बन्धन २
पागल उपाधी दिन्छ यहाँ , मायाले मनको कुरा बोल्दा १
घुम्स्याई नराख त्यो माया , के नै जान्छ र दिल खोल्दा २
२.केटी :
रंग न ढंग को कुरा गर्छ , छेउ टुप्पो केही नमिल्ने 
दश बित्ते मान्छे तीस बित्ते फुँई , कसरी मैले पत्याउने
बाउ बाजेको इज्जत नफाल , आफ्नो छैन भन्दामा 
सोचेको होला मीठो कुरा गरि , मैच्याङ्लाई पारौंला फान्दामा



३.केटा :
आत्मालाई साक्षी राखेर मैच्याङ , मायाको तामसुक लेखौंला २
दफा दफामा मायाको बयान , मायाकै कानुन मानौँला २
जान अन्जानमा गल्ती भए , भोग्नलाई तयार छु सजाय १
इमान्दारी मेहनेती , च्याङ्बाको अर्को परिचय २

३.केटी :
नापीको हाकिम भन्दा जान्ने , कुराको कित्ता गर्न लाई
मायाको लाल पुर्जामा ,दम छैन विश्वास भर्न लाई
बेहोरा हेर्दा कैदि को जस्तो , यो बानी छिट्टै सुध्रियोस 
न्यायाधीश ले जस्तो मैले फेरि , बयान लिनु नपरोस् 


----------------------------------------------------
►TIMESTAMPS 
0:00 - Story  
0:00 - Song Start
0:00 - Last Story
0:00 - Credits Parts
----------------------------------------------------
Please, Subscribe to My YouTube Channel
https://www.youtube.com/@BishwoDong
----------------------------------------------------

लो-फाई भजन पारंपरिक भक्ति संगीत को लो-फाई संगीत के सुखदायक, उदासीन गुणों के साथ जोड़ता है। इसमें शांत धुन और कोमल लय होती है जो शांति और आध्यात्मिक चिंतन की भावना पैदा करती है। वाद्य-यंत्र में अक्सर तबला, हारमोनियम, सितार और बांसुरी जैसे ध्वनिक वाद्य शामिल होते हैं, जो विनाइल क्रैकल या परिवेशी ध्वनियों जैसे सूक्ष्म लो-फाई तत्वों पर परतदार होते हैं। स्वर, चाहे एकल हों या कोरस, दिल से भावनाओं के साथ भक्ति गीत प्रस्तुत करते हैं, जो एक ध्यानपूर्ण और चिंतनशील मूड को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं। यह संलयन एक अनूठा सुनने का अनुभव बनाता है जो प्राचीन आध्यात्मिक परंपराओं को समकालीन लो-फाई सौंदर्यशास्त्र के साथ मिलाता है, जो आंतरिक सद्भाव और श्रद्धा में एक शांत यात्रा प्रदान करता है।

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

snippet.title: Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan
snippet.description:
Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ❤️
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, “Gajale Sunchari.”

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.


Audio Credits

Lyrics
Hark Saud

Vocal & Music
Sujan Chapagain

Poem
Pallawib

Music Producer/Mixing/Mastering
Kobid Bazra

Strings Orchestration and Recordings
Bikesh Bazra

Tabla
Jagannath Dhaugoda

Keys
Anish (Dotted Nose)

Flute
Ratna BK 

Sarangi

Sujan Chapagain | Gajale Sunchari [ गाजले सुनचरी ] ArtMandu | Travel Song | Feat. Sampada & Samishan

Chitwan ❤️
the place where I took my first breath, walked my first steps, discovered the world for the first time, and heard my first music. Today, with love and gratitude for that homeland, I am proud to present my travel song, “Gajale Sunchari.”

This song is dedicated to all the wandering souls who love to travel freely, explore new places, and discover the beauty of life along the way.

snippet.title: Waka Waka - Esto es Africa (sub. español + lyrics) Canción Oficial de la Copa Mundial Sudáfrica 2010
snippet.description:
📀 Canción: Waka Waka (Esto es África)
📼 Artista: Shakira

⏩ Escucha al artista original y apóyalo en sus redes oficiales:
• 📺 YouTube: /@Shakira 

🎥 Video oficial:
  https://youtu.be/dzsuE5ugxf4?si=IWs2MxZRCa5_8h-g 
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🕹️ Si te gustó este video, suscríbete para no perderte nuevas joyas de todos los tiempos:
📺  www.youtube.com/@SaboraManzana  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Letra:
Llegó el momento
Caen las murallas
Va a comenzar la única justa de las batallas

No duele el golpe
No existe el miedo
Quítate el polvo, ponte de pie y vuelves al ruedo

Y la presión se siente
Espera en ti tu gente

Ahora vamos por todo
Y te acompaña la suerte
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Porque esto es África

Tsamina mina, eh, eh
Waka waka, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Porque esto es África

Oye a tu Dios y
No estarás solo
Llegaste aquí para brillar, lo tienes todo

La hora se acerca
Es el momento
Vas a ganar cada batalla, ya lo presiento

Hay que empezar de cero
Para tocar el cielo

Ahora vamos por todo
Y todos vamos por ellos
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Porque esto es África

Tsamina mina, eh, eh
Waka waka, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Anawa, ah, ah

Tsamina mina, eh, eh
Waka waka, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Porque esto es África

Awabuye lamajoni, ipikipiki mama
Wa A to Z
Bathi susa lamajoni, ipikipiki mama
From East to West

Bathi waka waka ma, eh, eh
Waka waka ma, eh, eh
Zonk' izizwe mazibuye
'Cause this is África

(Tsamina mina)
(Anawa, ah, ah)
(Tsamina mina)
(Tsamina mina)
(Anawa, ah, ah)

Tsamina mina, eh, eh
Waka waka, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Anawa, ah, ah

Tsamina mina, eh, eh
Waka waka, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Porque esto es África

Django, eh, eh
Django, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Anawa, ah, ah

Django, eh, eh
Django, eh, eh
Tsamina mina zangalewa
Anawa, ah, ah

Porque esto es África
Porque esto es África
Zama qhela
Kwela, kwela
Zama qhela

snippet.title: [NP] FFMAI 2026 Summer | Main Event Day 3
snippet.description:
The Main Event of Free Fire Max Asia Invitational 2026 Summer is here and the BEST teams from South East Asia join this stage of the tournament.
Day 3 of Main Event: GROUP A vs GROUP B

Top 12 teams from the Main Event will play the Grand Finals, in Champion Rush format on 21 June!

Group A
♦ EXTREME EX
♦ TOTAL WINNER
♦ S8UL ESPORTS
♦ ALL GAMERS GLOBAL
♦ TITAN ESPORTS CLUB

♦ RRQ KAZU
♦ DRS GAMING

Schedule 📋

Are you ready to witness the champion, who will be CROWNED BY FIRE!

snippet.title: Shawn Mendes - Treat You Better (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (🔔) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

Follow Shawn Mendes:
https://www.instagram.com/shawnmendes
https://www.facebook.com/ShawnMendesOfficial
https://www.tiktok.com/@shawnmendes

Follow Gseven Records:
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/gsevenrecords/
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/gsevenrecords/

We have an official permission from the right holders to upload this music

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
I won't lie to you
I know he's just not right for you
And you can tell me if I'm off, but I see it on your face
When you say that he's the one that you want
And you're spending all your time in this wrong situation
And anytime you want it to stop

[Chorus]
I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time
On all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can

[Verse 2]
I'll stop time for you
The second you say you'd like me to
I just wanna give you the loving that you're missing
Baby, just to wake up with you
Would be everything I need and this could be so different
Tell me what you want to do

[Chorus]
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time
On all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can

[Post-Chorus]
Better than he can

[Bridge]
Give me a sign
Take my hand, we'll be fine
Promise I won't let you down
Just know that you don't
Have to do this alone
Promise I'll never let you down

[Chorus]
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time
On all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can

[Post-Chorus]
Better than he can

[Chorus]
I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time
On all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can

[Verse 2]
I'll stop time for you
The second you say you'd like me to
I just wanna give you the loving that you're missing
Baby, just to wake up with you
Would be everything I need and this could be so different
Tell me what you want to do

[Chorus]
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time
On all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can

Better than he can

[Bridge]
Give me a sign
Take my hand, we'll be fine
Promise I won't let you down
Just know that you don't
Have to do this alone
Promise I'll never let you down

[Chorus]
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time
On all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better
Better than he can

[Post-Chorus]
Better than he can

snippet.description:
Argentina vs Austria — FIFA World Cup 2026 Simulation (PES 2021 Season Update)

The stage is set for a massive clash as the global heavyweights, Argentina, go toe-to-toe with a fierce and tactical Austria squad in this FIFA World Cup 2026 match simulation! Recreated with peak realism in eFootball PES 2021 featuring the latest 2026 Season Update patches, fully updated international squad rosters, and premium broadcast-style presentation.

Can Argentina's world-class flair and attacking genius break open the game, or will Austria's relentless, organized high press neutralize the champions and spark a massive upset? Sit back and catch every minute of this full CPU vs. CPU tactical simulation!

snippet.title: 🔴 [HI] GRAND FINALS - CHAMPION RUSH | FFMAI 2026 SUMMER
snippet.description:
THE GRAND FINALS OF FFMAI 2026 SUMMER IS HERE!
After a gruelling Main Event stage, 12 teams have qualified for the GRAND FINALS, which will be played in CHAMPION RUSH format!

The Top 12 finalists-
♦ Revenant XSpark
♦ Team Apex Gaming
♦ S8UL Esports
♦ All Gamers Global
♦ Team Falcons
♦ RRQ Kazu
♦ Bigetron By Vitality
♦ Aurora Gaming
♦ Hotshot Esports
♦ Titan Esports Club
♦ Straw Hats
♦ DEMONS PRIDE

Champion Rush format-
Any team that reaches 90 points will activate Champion Rush.
The team to win a Booyah! after activating Champion Rush will be crowned CHAMPIONS!

Schedule 📋
📅 Grand Finals - June 21

Are you ready to witness the champion, who will be CROWNED BY FIRE!

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #crownedbyfire

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Qu'est-ce que Roblox ? Roblox est un univers virtuel en ligne où les enfants de tous âges peuvent interagir, créer, s'amuser et apprendre en toute sécurité. ROBLOX est unique en son genre : presque tout y est conçu et construit par les membres de la communauté. Chaque joueur commence par choisir un avatar et lui donner une identité. Il peut ensuite explorer ROBLOX et interagir avec les autres en discutant, en jouant à des jeux ou en collaborant sur des projets créatifs. Chaque joueur reçoit également son propre terrain virtuel non aménagé, ainsi qu'une boîte à outils virtuelle pour concevoir et construire tout ce qu'il souhaite : un gratte-ciel navigable, un hélicoptère fonctionnel, un flipper géant, un jeu multijoueur de « Capture du drapeau » ou toute autre création encore inimaginée. Ce premier terrain virtuel est gratuit. En participant et en créant des choses originales, les membres de ROBLOX peuvent gagner des badges spéciaux et des ROBLOX dollars (« Robux »). Ils peuvent ensuite utiliser ces Robux pour acheter des vêtements et des accessoires pour leur avatar, ainsi que des matériaux de construction premium, des composants interactifs et des mécanismes fonctionnels.

Що таке Roblox? ROBLOX — це віртуальний онлайн-майстерня та майстерня, де діти різного віку можуть безпечно взаємодіяти, творити, розважатися та навчатися. Він унікальний тим, що практично все в ROBLOX розроблено та створено членами спільноти. Кожен гравець починає з вибору аватара та надання йому ідентичності. Потім він може досліджувати ROBLOX — взаємодіяти з іншими через чат, ігри або співпрацювати над творчими проектами. Кожному гравцеві також надається власний шматок незабудованої нерухомості разом з віртуальним набором інструментів, за допомогою якого можна проектувати та будувати що завгодно — будь то хмарочос, яким можна керувати, робочий гелікоптер, гігантський пінбольний автомат, багатокористувацька гра «Захоплення прапора» чи якесь інше, ще не вигадане творіння. Ця перша ділянка віртуальної землі безкоштовна. Беручи участь та будуючи круті речі, учасники ROBLOX можуть заробляти спеціальні значки, а також долари ROBLOX («Robux»). У свою чергу, вони можуть купувати одяг та аксесуари для аватарів в онлайн-каталозі, а також преміальні будівельні матеріали, інтерактивні компоненти та робочі механізми.

ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்றால் என்ன? ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்பது ஒரு ஆன்லைன் மெய்நிகர் விளையாட்டுத் தளம் மற்றும் பட்டறை ஆகும், இங்கு அனைத்து வயது குழந்தைகளும் பாதுகாப்பாகப் பழகலாம், உருவாக்கலாம், மகிழலாம் மற்றும் கற்றுக்கொள்ளலாம். O que é Roblox? ROBLOX é um playground e oficina virtual online, onde crianças de todas as idades podem interagir, criar, se divertir e aprender com segurança. O que torna o ROBLOX único é que praticamente tudo nele é projetado e construído por membros da comunidade. Cada jogador começa escolhendo um avatar e dando a ele uma identidade. Em seguida, pode explorar o ROBLOX — interagindo com outros jogadores por meio de bate-papo, jogos ou colaborando em projetos criativos. Cada jogador também recebe seu próprio terreno virtual não desenvolvido, juntamente com uma caixa de ferramentas virtual para projetar e construir qualquer coisa — seja um arranha-céu navegável, um helicóptero funcional, uma máquina de pinball gigante, um jogo multiplayer de "Capture a Bandeira" ou alguma outra criação ainda não imaginada. Não há custo para este primeiro terreno virtual. Ao participar e construir coisas legais, os membros do ROBLOX podem ganhar distintivos especiais, bem como dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Por sua vez, eles podem usar esses dólares para comprar roupas e acessórios para seus avatares, além de materiais de construção premium, componentes interativos e mecanismos funcionais no catálogo online.

מה זה רובלוקס? רובלוקס הוא מגרש משחקים וירטואלי מקוון וסדנה, שבו ילדים בכל הגילאים יכולים לתקשר, ליצור, ליהנות וללמוד בבטחה. זה ייחודי בכך שכמעט כל דבר ב-ROBLOX מתוכנן ונבנה על ידי חברי הקהילה. כל שחקן מתחיל בבחירת אווטאר ומתן זהות לו. לאחר מכן הוא יכול לחקור את ROBLOX - לתקשר עם אחרים על ידי צ'אט, משחקי משחקים או שיתוף פעולה בפרויקטים יצירתיים. כל שחקן מקבל גם פיסת קרקע לא מפותחת משלו יחד עם ארגז כלים וירטואלי שבעזרתו ניתן לעצב ולבנות כל דבר - בין אם זה גורד שחקים ניווט, מסוק פעיל, מכונת פינבול ענקית, משחק מרובה משתתפים "לכידת הדגל" או יצירה אחרת שטרם הומצאה. אין עלות עבור חלקת אדמה וירטואלית ראשונה זו. על ידי השתתפות ובניית דברים מגניבים, חברי ROBLOX יכולים להרוויח תגים מיוחדים וכן דולרים של ROBLOX ("Robux"). בתורם, הם יכולים לקנות בקטלוג המקוון בגדים ואביזרים לאווטארים, כמו גם חומרי בנייה איכותיים, רכיבים אינטראקטיביים ומנגנונים פועלים.

Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX — berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. రాబ్లాక్స్ అంటే ఏమిటి? ROBLOX అనేది ఒక ఆన్‌లైన్ వర్చువల్ ఆటస్థలం మరియు వర్క్‌షాప్, ఇక్కడ అన్ని వయసుల పిల్లలు సురక్షితంగా ఒకరితో ఒకరు సంభాషించుకోవచ్చు, సృష్టించవచ్చు, ఆనందించవచ్చు మరియు నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. దీని ప్రత్యేకత ఏమిటంటే, ROBLOX లోని ప్రతిదీ దాదాపుగా కమ్యూనిటీ సభ్యులచేతనే రూపొందించబడి, నిర్మించబడుతుంది. ప్రతి ఆటగాడు ఒక అవతార్‌ను ఎంచుకుని, దానికి ఒక గుర్తింపును ఇవ్వడం ద్వారా ప్రారంభిస్తాడు. ఆ తర్వాత వారు చాటింగ్ చేయడం, ఆటలు ఆడటం లేదా సృజనాత్మక ప్రాజెక్టులపై కలిసి పనిచేయడం ద్వారా ఇతరులతో సంభాషిస్తూ ROBLOX ను అన్వేషించవచ్చు. ప్రతి ఆటగాడికి వారి స్వంత అభివృద్ధి చెందని భూభాగంతో పాటు, ఒక వర్చువల్ టూల్‌బాక్స్ కూడా ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. దానితో వారు దేనినైనా డిజైన్ చేసి నిర్మించవచ్చు — అది ప్రయాణించగల ఆకాశహర్మ్యం కావచ్చు, పనిచేసే హెలికాప్టర్ కావచ్చు, ఒక పెద్ద పిన్‌బాల్ మెషిన్ కావచ్చు, మల్టీప్లేయర్ “క్యాప్చర్ ది ఫ్లాగ్” గేమ్ కావచ్చు లేదా ఇంకా ఊహించని మరేదైనా సృష్టి కావచ్చు. ఈ మొదటి వర్చువల్ భూభాగానికి ఎలాంటి ఖర్చు ఉండదు. పాల్గొనడం ద్వారా మరియు అద్భుతమైన వస్తువులను నిర్మించడం ద్వారా, ROBLOX సభ్యులు ప్రత్యేక బ్యాడ్జ్‌లతో పాటు ROBLOX డాలర్లను (“రోబక్స్”) సంపాదించవచ్చు. దీనికి ప్రతిగా, వారు ఆన్‌లైన్ కేటలాగ్‌లో అవతార్ దుస్తులు మరియు యాక్సెసరీలతో పాటు ప్రీమియం నిర్మాణ సామగ్రి, ఇంటరాక్టివ్ భాగాలు మరియు పనిచేసే యంత్రాంగాలను కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు.

Co to jest Roblox? ROBLOX to wirtualny plac zabaw i warsztat online, gdzie dzieci w każdym wieku mogą bezpiecznie wchodzić w interakcje, tworzyć, bawić się i uczyć. Jego wyjątkowość polega na tym, że praktycznie wszystko w ROBLOX jest projektowane i konstruowane przez członków społeczności. Każdy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu tożsamości. Następnie może odkrywać ROBLOX — wchodząc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub współpracę przy kreatywnych projektach. Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny, niezagospodarowany kawałek ziemi wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może projektować i budować cokolwiek zechce — czy to nawigowalny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Zdobądź Flagę” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Ta pierwsza wirtualna działka jest bezpłatna. Uczestnicząc w zabawie i budując fajne rzeczy, członkowie ROBLOX mogą zdobywać specjalne odznaki, a także dolary ROBLOX („Robuxy”). Mogą oni również przeglądać katalog online, aby kupić ubrania i akcesoria dla awatarów, a także wysokiej jakości materiały budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i działające mechanizmy.

Robloxとは？ Robloxは、あらゆる年齢の子どもたちが安全に交流し、創造し、楽しみ、学ぶことができるオンラインの仮想空間とワークショップです。 ROBLOXのユニークな点は、ほぼすべてのコンテンツがコミュニティメンバーによってデザイン、構築されていることです。プレイヤーはまずアバターを選び、名前を付けます。その後、ROBLOXの世界を探索し、チャットやゲーム、共同制作プロジェクトなどを通じて他のプレイヤーと交流できます。各プレイヤーには、未開発の仮想土地と、あらゆるものをデザイン・構築できる仮想ツールボックスが与えられます。例えば、自由に移動できる超高層ビル、実際に動くヘリコプター、巨大なピンボールマシン、マルチプレイヤーの「キャプチャー・ザ・フラッグ」ゲーム、あるいはまだ誰も想像もしていないような創造物など、何でも作ることができます。この最初の仮想土地は無料です。ROBLOXメンバーは、参加したり、素晴らしい作品を制作したりすることで、特別なバッジやROBLOXドル（「Robux」）を獲得できます。獲得したRobuxを使って、オンラインカタログでアバターの服やアクセサリー、プレミアムな建築資材、インタラクティブなコンポーネント、動作するメカニズムなどを購入できます。

Что такое Roblox? ROBLOX — это онлайн-виртуальная игровая площадка и мастерская, где дети всех возрастов могут безопасно общаться, творить, развлекаться и учиться. Его уникальность заключается в том, что практически всё в ROBLOX создаётся и разрабатывается членами сообщества. Каждый игрок начинает с выбора аватара и присвоения ему имени. Затем он может исследовать ROBLOX — взаимодействовать с другими, общаясь в чате, играя в игры или сотрудничая над творческими проектами. Каждому игроку также предоставляется собственный участок необработанной виртуальной земли вместе с виртуальным набором инструментов, с помощью которого можно проектировать и строить что угодно — будь то небоскрёб, по которому можно перемещаться, работающий вертолёт, гигантский пинбол, многопользовательская игра «Захват флага» или какое-либо другое, ещё не придуманное творение. Первый участок виртуальной земли предоставляется бесплатно. Участвуя в игре и создавая интересные вещи, участники ROBLOX могут зарабатывать специальные значки, а также виртуальную валюту ROBLOX («Robux»). В свою очередь, они могут просматривать онлайн-каталог, чтобы приобрести одежду и аксессуары для аватаров, а также премиальные строительные материалы, интерактивные компоненты и рабочие механизмы.

ਰੋਬਲੋਕਸ ਕੀ ਹੈ? ROBLOX ਇੱਕ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਖੇਡ ਦਾ ਮੈਦਾਨ ਅਤੇ ਵਰਕਸ਼ਾਪ ਹੈ, ਜਿੱਥੇ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚੇ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਢੰਗ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਮੌਜ-ਮਸਤੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਿੱਖ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਇਹ ਇਸ ਪੱਖੋਂ ਵਿਲੱਖਣ ਹੈ ਕਿ ROBLOX 'ਤੇ ਲਗਭਗ ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਭਾਈਚਾਰੇ ਦੇ ਮੈਂਬਰਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾਈ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਇੱਕ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਚੁਣ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਪਛਾਣ ਦੇ ਕੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ। ਉਹ ਫਿਰ ROBLOX ਦੀ ਪੜਚੋਲ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ - ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਕੇ, ਗੇਮਾਂ ਖੇਡ ਕੇ, ਜਾਂ ਰਚਨਾਤਮਕ ਪ੍ਰੋਜੈਕਟਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਕਰਕੇ ਦੂਜਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਟੂਲਬਾਕਸ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਆਪਣੀ ਅਣਵਿਕਸਿਤ ਰੀਅਲ ਅਸਟੇਟ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਟੁਕੜਾ ਵੀ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨਾਲ ਉਹ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ - ਭਾਵੇਂ ਇਹ ਇੱਕ ਨੇਵੀਗੇਬਲ ਸਕਾਈਸਕ੍ਰੈਪਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈਲੀਕਾਪਟਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਵਿਸ਼ਾਲ ਪਿੰਨਬਾਲ ਮਸ਼ੀਨ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਮਲਟੀਪਲੇਅਰ "ਕੈਪਚਰ ਦ ਫਲੈਗ" ਗੇਮ ਹੋਵੇ ਜਾਂ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰ, ਅਜੇ ਤੱਕ ਸੁਪਨੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਹੀਂ ਆਈ ਰਚਨਾ। ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ ਦੇ ਇਸ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਪਲਾਟ ਲਈ ਕੋਈ ਕੀਮਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ। ਹਿੱਸਾ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਵਧੀਆ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਬਣਾ ਕੇ, ROBLOX ਮੈਂਬਰ ROBLOX ਡਾਲਰਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਬੈਜ ("Robux") ਵੀ ਕਮਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਬਦਲੇ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਕੱਪੜੇ ਅਤੇ ਸਹਾਇਕ ਉਪਕਰਣਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਮੀਅਮ ਬਿਲਡਿੰਗ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ, ਇੰਟਰਐਕਟਿਵ ਹਿੱਸੇ ਅਤੇ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਵਿਧੀਆਂ ਖਰੀਦਣ ਲਈ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਕੈਟਾਲਾਗ ਖਰੀਦ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ।

ما هي روبلوكس؟ روبلوكس عبارة عن منصة ألعاب افتراضية وورشة عمل إبداعية على الإنترنت، حيث يمكن للأطفال من جميع الأعمار التفاعل بأمان، والإبداع، والاستمتاع، والتعلم. ما يميز روبلوكس هو أن كل شيء تقريبًا فيها مصمم ومُنشأ من قبل أعضاء المجتمع. يبدأ كل لاعب باختيار شخصية افتراضية وتحديد هويتها. ثم يمكنهم استكشاف روبلوكس والتفاعل مع الآخرين من خلال الدردشة، أو لعب الألعاب، أو التعاون في مشاريع إبداعية. كما يُمنح كل لاعب قطعة أرض افتراضية غير مطورة، بالإضافة إلى مجموعة أدوات افتراضية لتصميم وبناء أي شيء، سواء كان ناطحة سحاب قابلة للاستكشاف، أو طائرة هليكوبتر عاملة، أو آلة بينبول عملاقة، أو لعبة "الاستيلاء على العلم" متعددة اللاعبين، أو أي ابتكار آخر لم يخطر على بال أحد. هذه القطعة الأولى من الأرض الافتراضية مجانية. من خلال المشاركة وبناء أشياء رائعة، يمكن لأعضاء روبلوكس ربح شارات مميزة، بالإضافة إلى عملة روبلوكس ("روبوكس"). وبدورهم، يمكنهم التسوق من المتجر الإلكتروني لشراء ملابس وإكسسوارات لشخصياتهم الافتراضية، بالإضافة إلى مواد بناء مميزة، ومكونات تفاعلية، وآليات عاملة.

#روبلوكس دفولتين
